summary: Iteration 323: Observatory Live Events & AI Module Buttons Fix - ALL TESTS PASSED. (1) Observatory Live Events now expand on click showing description, time badges ('6 days away'), and peak rate badges ('18/hr peak'). Clicking another event collapses the previous one. (2) AI module buttons in mixer fixed - were pointing to non-existent routes (/virtual-reality, /ai-visuals), now correctly navigate to /vr and /avatar. (3) All critical pages tested: Herbology, Breathing, Light Therapy, Sovereign Circle, Observatory (all 3 tabs).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Observatory Live Events feature fully working - events expand on click with descriptions and badges. AI module buttons in mixer now navigate correctly: Image to Video -> /vr, AI Art -> /creation-stories, Text to Image -> /avatar, Text to Speech -> /mantras, AI Music -> /soundscapes, AI Avatar -> /avatar. All critical pages load correctly.
